## Quality Gates

- [ ] Ruff passes
- [ ] Mypy passes
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] ADR updated when architecture changed
- [ ] Policy catalog updated if new actions were added
- [ ] No domain-specific logic added
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No raw provider objects exposed
- [ ] No direct adapter leakage
- [ ] No background worker added without explicit instruction
- [ ] No external calls in tests
